events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide compliance. Scenario: disconnect not within sight. NEC Art. 430 requires disconnecting means within sight from motor and driven machinery location? NEC 430.102(B): disconnecting means shall be located within sight from motor and driven machinery location. Exception allows lockable disconnect out of sight if installed according to conditions. Since observed disconnect not within sight and no mention of lockable exception, non-compliant. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective? non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? Safety hazard inability to quickly disconnect. Need fill fields. percent_complete maybe 80? value 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty string? Schema says string. Use "". Findings: disconnect not within sight of motor. Actions: relocate disconnect to within sight or install lockable disconnect per NEC 430.102(B) exception. Rationale: NEC requires disconnect within sight; absent exception, fails. References: NEC 430.102(B). Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.
